title: dos2unix
html:
dos2unix

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

dos2unix -f -O /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

dos2unix -f -n /path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file
excerpt: dos2unix File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged dos2unix -f -O /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged dos2unix -f -n /path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file
